evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: document data governance practices; statistical and machine learning knowledge
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Mix of governance concern and delivery focus; one governance mention in a delivery-dominated JD suggests mixed framing.
evidence.domain_risk: Manufacturing industry with internal dashboards and reporting
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Manufacturing/electronics company where data supports internal decisions without financial reporting or regulatory impact.
evidence.data_team_maturity: designing scalable data pipelines; ETL/ELT pipeline design required
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Emphasis on building infrastructure and pipelines from scratch, with no mention of existing data teams or established governance.
evidence.jd_authorship: collaborating with product and business teams; document data governance practices; automate reporting
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Generic language typical of recruiter-written JDs; could apply to any BI role without specific context.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: product and business teams; executive reports
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Product + business audience with reporting emphasis, suggesting mixed but leaning execution.
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Support-oriented verbs indicate execution-focused role receiving scoped work.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No AI coding or infrastructure expectations mentioned.
evidence.testing_framing: No testing or data quality signal anywhere in the JD.
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: No mention of testing frameworks, data quality, or validation practices.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: None: JD is framed in delivery and capability terms with no risk register.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: designing scalable data pipelines; ETL/ELT pipeline design and scheduling
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Pipeline building focus suggests fix_scale posture.
evidence.language_gate: The ideal candidate must be eligible to work full time in the country without sponsorship
